resources.string: On-device LLM inference for active, user-visible requests initiated from authorized apps on the same device.
Approval blocked: signing certificate changed since this request was shown.

This package was previously approved with a different signing certificate. A re-signed APK could be a key rotation, a malicious replacement, or a Play Store compromise. Verify the new fingerprint before approving.
I understand — this is a new signing key
Confirm with biometrics or device PIN to approve this app.
Confirm with biometrics or device PIN to revoke this app.
Set up a screen lock or biometric to approve apps.
